name: Dimensional Projection
descriptionTemplate: Daffodil gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Whenever Daffodil's card enters {Ultra Space}, place 1 {Insight} into hand, up to 2 times per turn.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Daffodil gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Whenever Daffodil's card enters {Ultra Space}, place 1 {Insight} into hand, up to 2 times per turn. Generate 1 Temporary {Skull Reaver} with 0 Arithmetica Cost and place it into {Ultra Space}.
